dashboard.title: Sourcing Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your requests for quotation (RFQ) and find the best suppliers in one place.
dashboard.guideStep1Desc: Write a clear description of the materials/products you need, including quantity and target port.
dashboard.guideStep2Desc: Our system broadcasts your RFQ to hundreds of verified suppliers matching your specifications.
dashboard.guideStep3Desc: Evaluate quotes, MOQ, and supplier capabilities directly from your chat inbox.

bookmarks.title: Supplier Wishlist
bookmarks.subtitle: List of suppliers you saved for comparison or future contact.
bookmarks.emptyDesc: Search for new suppliers and click the bookmark icon to save them here.

compare.title: Compare Suppliers
compare.subtitle: Side-by-side comparison of specifications, MOQ, certifications, and production capacity.
compare.emptyDesc: Please search for suppliers or open your Wishlist to choose suppliers to compare.

rfqList.title: Request for Quotation (RFQ) List
rfqList.subtitle: Monitor request status from various suppliers for your sourcing needs.

rfqCreate.title: Create New Request for Quotation (RFQ)
rfqCreate.subtitle: Describe your B2B sourcing requirements to get official quotations from verified suppliers.
rfqCreate.tipsDesc: Include technical specs, required certificates (e.g. Halal, SNI, BPOM), and target port to get fast, accurate quotes.
rfqCreate.placeholderProduct: e.g., Organic Coconut Sugar, Quartz Mesh 325
rfqCreate.placeholderDestination: e.g., Tanjung Priok (FOB), Tanjung Perak, or Rotterdam Port (CIF)
rfqCreate.placeholderDescription: Write complete technical specs, desired packaging (bag/drum/bulk), delivery timeline, required test report certificates, etc.
rfqCreate.uploadPlaceholder: Click to upload or drag & drop laboratory test report (COA) / design files

rfqDetail.title: Request for Quotation Details
rfqDetail.subtitle: View your sourcing specifications and evaluate quotations submitted by suppliers.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information, B2B company profile, and settings.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Monitor all RFQ updates, new quotations, and supplier chats.

onboarding.title: Buyer Onboarding
onboarding.subtitle: Complete your B2B profile to start creating sourcing RFQs.

support.title: Support Center
support.subtitle: Need assistance? Submit a support ticket or contact our customer service team.
